ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keyboard_layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyboard layout */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyboard layout (e.g., Numeric, Alpha numeric) */,
  "layout_type" TEXT /* Type of keyboard layout (e.g., numeric, alphanumeric, symbol, scan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyboard layout */,
  "layout_version" TEXT /* Current version of the layout */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the layout is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layout was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layout was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned to a layout */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyboard layout being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES keyboard_layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyboard layout being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change being made (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES keyboard_layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the audit entry is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyboard layout being configured */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_settings_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES keyboard_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyboard layout being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_versions_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES keyboard_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mx_versions" (
  "mx_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MX version */,
  "mx_version" TEXT /* Version of MX (e.g., 7.1+) */,
  "mx_description" TEXT /* Description of the MX version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the MX version is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MX version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MX version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mx_id")
)
